title: Lead Recipe Backport
description: Lead Recipe backported from 1.21.6 to older versions
body:
# Lead Recipe Backport

Backports the **modern lead crafting recipe from Minecraft 1.21.6** to older versions — for easier, more consistent and slime-free crafting.

## Features:
- Adds the updated **lead recipe** from Minecraft 1.21.6

- Craft **2 Leads** using **5× String** → no slimeball required

![Lead Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09a7ffcda3dad2640102c479f2db818f569d1895.png)

## Compatibility:

- **Mod**: Minecraft **1.20 - 1.21.5**

- **Datapack**: Minecraft **1.20 - 1.21.5**

- No dependencies needed
